name: Ikelos, the Dream Mirror Mara
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－イケロス
name_jp_tl: Succubus of the Dream Magic Mirror - Ikelos
desc: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Dream Mirror" monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Dream Mirror" monster from your hand, except "Ikelos, the Dream Mirror Mara". During the Main or Battle Phase, if "Dream Mirror of Joy" is in a Field Zone (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Ikelos, the Dream Mirror Sprite" from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Ikelos, the Dream Mirror Mara" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Dream Mirror" monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Dream Mirror" monster from your hand, except "Ikelos, the Dream Mirror Mara". You can only use each effect of "Ikelos, the Dream Mirror Mara" once per turn.
